title: calamagrostis langsdorfii var. lactea
intro: Calamagrostis langsdorfii var. lactea, also known as white feather grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to China and the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Calamagrostis langsdorfii var. lactea include its ability to promote digestion, relieve coughs, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
